caption:
SEO gets you found. AEO gets you chosen.

SEO is about ranking in a list of ten blue links and letting the patient choose. AEO is about whether ChatGPT, Gemini and Perplexity actually name and recommend you when someone asks who to hire.

Different signals, different work. You can sit at #3 on Google and be completely absent from every AI answer — I see it weekly.

hook: Your reviews are now an AI ranking signal

caption:
Reviews stopped being just a trust badge — they're now a signal AI uses to decide who to recommend.

And it's not only your star rating. Volume and recency matter: a wall of glowing reviews from three years ago can still lose to a competitor collecting a few fresh ones every month.

Keeping reviews flowing is one of the highest-leverage things you can do for AI visibility.

hook: 4 places AI looks before recommending you
points: Your website — is it clear and structured?
Google Business Profile + reviews.
Trusted directories and “best of” lists.
Press and third-party mentions.
cta: Blank in one spot = a gap. Free scan in bio.
caption:
Before AI recommends a surgeon, it checks four places:

1. Your website — is it clear and structured, or a wall of text?
2. Your Google Business Profile and reviews.
3. The trusted directories and “best of” lists.
4. Press and third-party mentions.

A blank or weak spot in any one of these is usually why the AI reaches for a competitor instead.

#plasticsurgeon #medicalmarketing #aisearch #chatgpt #medspa #cosmeticsurgery #theaeoloop
firstComment: You don't need all four perfect — but a total blank in one (say, no RealSelf presence) is often the single thing holding you back.

hook: Why AI can't quote your website
points: One long wall of text is hard to lift.
AI grabs clear headings and short answers.
FAQs are pre-packaged answers it loves.
cta: Give AI something to quote. Start with a free scan.
caption:
If AI never quotes your site, it's often because your pages are hard to lift from.

A single wall of text is tough for an engine to pull a clean answer out of. What it grabs easily: clear headings that match how people ask, short paragraphs, and FAQ blocks — pre-packaged answers it can reuse word for word.

Same expertise, packaged so AI can actually use it.

#plasticsurgeon #medicalmarketing #aisearch #chatgpt #medspa #cosmeticsurgery #theaeoloop

hook: What being invisible to AI actually costs

cta: Stop the silent leak. Free scan — link in bio.
caption:
The hardest part of being invisible to AI is that it's silent.

Every “best surgeon near me” query is a patient making a decision — and there's no page two in an AI answer. You're either named or you're invisible. When you're left out, no lead form goes unfilled that you'd notice; the patient simply never knew you existed.

You can't fix a leak you can't see. First step is looking.

#plasticsurgeon #aisearch #chatgpt #medicalmarketing #medspa #cosmeticsurgery #theaeoloop
